channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Armed man shot and killed by law enforcement outside Mar-a-Lago
item.description: Law enforcement shot and killed an armed man outside of President Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort Sunday, the Secret Service said. The big picture: The pres...

item.title: U.S.-Iran talks expected Thursday to discuss nuclear proposal
item.description: U.S. and Iranian negotiators are expected to meet in Geneva on Thursday to discuss a detailed Iranian proposal for a nuclear deal. A senior U.S. offic...

item.title: MAGA embraces hockey gold medal with latest swipes at Canada
item.description: America is celebrating its first U.S. men's hockey gold since the '80s , toppling Canada with a clutch overtime goal amid historically sharp tensions ...

item.title: JD or Marco? Trump asking advisers about 2028
item.description: President Trump has a new parlor game he's springing on advisers and confidants: JD Vance or Marco Rubio? That is, do people favor the vice president ...

item.title: DHS reverses on TSA PreCheck pause as snowstorm scatters travel
item.description: It's a perfect storm: As extreme winter weather triggers thousands of flight cancellations, the federal government created more travel questions. The ...

item.title: Josh Shapiro to neighbors: Get off my lawn
item.description: The Pennsylvania governor and Democratic star is embroiled in a dispute with his neighbor that has escalated into an unlikely political saga.

item.title: Armed man shot and killed inside Mar-a-Lago perimeter, Secret Service says
item.description: The man was identified as Austin Tucker Martin of North Carolina. The Secret Service said he was observed carrying “what appeared to be a shotgun and ...

item.title: Supreme Court put the brakes on Trump, after Congress helped him step on the gas
item.description: Trump has walked all over Congress but prior presidents of both parties have stretched the bounds of emergency powers.

item.title: Trump’s talk of sending a hospital ship to Greenland puzzles leaders
item.description: Trump says he’s sending a ship to care for Greenland’s sick. But the territory doesn’t want the help and the U.S. appears to have no hospital ships av...

item.title: Why more lawmakers are quitting Congress, and what it means for the midterms
item.description: Ahead of the midterm elections, a wave of House and Senate members are retiring or running for other offices.

item.title: ‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
